productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Handbags
description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this tote bag from United Colours Of Benetton will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall, multiplex or college. With a great silhouette and lots of space to accomodate all your essentials, you will notice that people will be unable to keep their eyes away from it!SizeHeight: 27 cmWidth: 12 cmsLength: 36 cmMade of 100% polyurethane on the outside and 100% polyester on the inside  for durabilityQuilted glossy look One roomy compartment with a branded zipper and sliderOrganiser sleeves for a mobile and essentialsOne inner zippered compartmentSynthetic woven tape strap with buckles at the sideInsert pockets on the front with a doggle and branded sliderPatch pockets with magnectic flaps, zippers and slidersZipper along the edges and base of the bag for extra space CareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
